landing.heroTitle: Writing at the intersection of enterprise security, human behaviour, and insider risk.
landing.heroBody: I write practical, research-backed analysis on insider threats, data protection, and enterprise risk management for professionals who need clarity over noise.
landing.writingBody: My work translates complex human behavioural indicators and technical vulnerabilities into concise, usable guidance for security teams, investigators, and risk leaders.
landing.comingSoonBody: Following my debut novel, The Definition of Normal, I am currently developing a non-fiction book focused on insider risk. This section previews the themes and frameworks it will cover.
landing.aboutBody1: I am an author and technologist based in Barrie, Ontario. Specializing in insider risk, I use my background in computer science and graduate studies in technology management to understand the vulnerabilities in both digital architectures and human behaviour.
landing.aboutBody2: Across my work, I explore how institutions can detect anomalous activity, improve investigative quality, and build insider risk programs that are both defensible and efficient.
landing.contactBody: If you're building training, thought leadership, or publication content in insider risk and enterprise security, I am open to collaborations, guest writing, and speaking opportunities.

insiderThreats.label: Insider Threat Detection
insiderThreats.desc: Identifying behavioural shifts, data exfiltration, and anomalous access patterns before they escalate.

programGovernance.label: Program Governance
programGovernance.desc: Building cross-functional insider risk programs that balance employee privacy, corporate culture, and security.

technicalControls.label: Technical Controls
technicalControls.desc: Translating complex security architectures and access management into actionable risk frameworks.

humanBehaviour.label: Human Behaviour
humanBehaviour.desc: Examining the psychology, pressures, and decision-making bias that drive malicious or negligent insider actions.

dataExfiltration.title: Data Exfiltration & Offboarding
dataExfiltration.desc: Patterns, red flags, and data constraints that matter when monitoring departing employees.

privilegedAccess.title: Privileged Access Abuse
privilegedAccess.desc: How trusted users interact with sensitive systems and what that means for proactive controls.

investigativeFrameworks.title: Investigative Frameworks
investigativeFrameworks.desc: Practical methodologies for investigating insider incidents while maintaining evidentiary standards.
